*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 21, 2026*

# Fed's Inflation Anchor Faces 3rd Supply Shock Test

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 21, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond President Tom Barkin said the ability of businesses and consumers to tolerate the latest in a series of supply shocks will determine whether the US central bank can continue to “look through” higher inflation without raising interest rates.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
While most outlets report the 'what', our intelligence engine focuses on the 'why'. This development in Markets isn't just a news item; it's a structural pivot.
